_next_steps_to_complete_task: 1. Claim 'markmd' npm package name OR use scoped name '@<scope>/markmd'
2. Log in to npm: npm login
3. Configure NPM OIDC trust on npmjs.com for the GitHub repository (see CONTRIBUTING.md task_13)
4. Add GitHub remote: git remote add origin https://github.com/<owner>/markmd
5. Push code to GitHub main branch
6. Create a changeset: pnpm changeset pre enter test && create changeset && git commit && push
7. Merge the Version Packages PR created by release.yml
8. Verify: npm view markmd@0.0.8-test.0 --json (check for provenance field)
9. Deprecate: npm deprecate markmd@0.0.8-test.0 'test release - do not use'
10. Update this file with real npm view output
